strengths: Exceeds minimum 15+ years experience requirement with 19-20 years spanning web, mobile, backend, infrastructure, and DevOps across multiple industries
Demonstrates technical mentorship and communication skills through workshops, conference talks, and organizing refactoring dojos and code katas
Cloud and infrastructure expertise evidenced by AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker, and DevOps work; founder of open-source GISCollective platform used by Green Map globally
concerns: AI expertise is limited to 6 months of infrastructure/tooling work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) with no demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms, contradicting the explicit preference for 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms'

No evidence of strategic customer advisory, product strategy influence, or technology adoption leadership — a core responsibility ('advise strategic customers and partners on adopting cutting-edge cloud and AI technologies')

Career titles (Senior Developer, Staff Engineer) show mid-level progression with no documented strategic influence or director-level organizational leadership required for a Principal Engineer position; recent 9-month career gap raises stability questions

key_factors.factor: Demonstrated AI product and platform expertise
Strategic customer advisory and organizational influence

response.justification: Although Szabo meets the 15-year baseline and demonstrates solid technical breadth across infrastructure and full-stack development, his profile is misaligned with this Principal Engineer—Director-level, AI-strategy-focused role. His AI experience is limited to 6 months of infrastructure tooling, not the 'recognized expertise' in AI and 'demonstrated products built with AI' the position explicitly requires. Critically, the resume provides no evidence of the core responsibility: advising strategic customers and partners on technology adoption. His career has been hands-on engineering at Senior/Staff level without the strategic influence, customer partnerships, or organizational leadership positioning expected of a Principal Engineer. The recent 9-month employment gap compounds concerns about stability for a high-stakes strategic role.
